X83 X70 ABS TRW Serie V1.2

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 01
Func Name: ABS

    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "10A0",
    "name": "DiagMode",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {

        "firstbyte": 2

    "name": "Données fournisseur",
    "deny_sds": []

    "sentbytes": "3BB0000000",

        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Identification": {

    "minbytes": 4,
    "sentbytes": "21C2",
    "name": "Etat Système",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Etat contact stop On-Off": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat fonction ABS": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat fontion REF": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Info rotation moteur pompe": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Tension Alim": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "sentbytes": "308000FDFE",
    "name": "EV Echap ARD",
    "deny_sds": []

    "deny_sds": [],

      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 17,

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },

        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },

    "minbytes": 11,
    "sentbytes": "1A99",
    "name": "Lecture Dates",
    "deny_sds": [],

    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Current Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Standard Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Historical Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Type Of Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Specific Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 10,
    "sentbytes": "1200040000",
    "name": "Contexte Panne",
    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 4
      }

      },
